revision.comment: Changed protection settings for "[[Template:Endflatlist]]": Always cascade protected via main page, for consistency ([Edit=Require administrator access] (indefinite) [Move=Require administrator access] (indefinite))
revision.text: {{documentation|Template:Flatlist/doc}}
{{documentation|Template:Flatlist/doc}}
{{documentation|Template:Flatlist/doc}} [[Category:pages from wikipedia]][[en:Endflatlist]][[Category:pages from wikipedia]]

revision.comment: Moving from [[Category:Pages from wikipedia]] to [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia6]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text: {{documentation|Template:Flatlist/doc}} [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia6]] [[en:Endflatlist]][[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia6]]

revision.comment: Moving from [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia6]] to [[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text: {{documentation|Template:Flatlist/doc}} [[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules]] [[en:Endflatlist]][[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules]]

revision.comment: Moving from [[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules]] to [[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules2]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text: {{documentation|Template:Flatlist/doc}} [[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules2]] [[en:Endflatlist]][[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules2]]
{{documentation|Template:Flatlist/doc}}
{{documentation|Template:Flatlist/doc}}

revision.comment: Fixing the bad interwiki on a template
revision.text: {{documentation|Template:Flatlist/doc}}

revision.comment: Adding [[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]][[Category:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text: {{documentation|Template:Flatlist/doc}} [[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]][[Category:Endflatlist]][[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]]

revision.comment: Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates.
revision.text: {{documentation|Template:Flatlist/doc}} {{draft categories| [[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] [[Category:Endflatlist]] }}

revision.comment: Removing from [[Category:Second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text: {{documentation|Template:Flatlist/doc}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Endflatlist]] }}

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{draft categories|" to "<noinclude> {{Draft categories| [[Category:templates with draft categories]]"

revision.comment: Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "{{Draft categories|↵}}" to ""
revision.text: {{documentation|Template:Flatlist/doc}} \n \n

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: {{documentation|Template:Flatlist/doc}} \n \n [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23410164509|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{documentation|Template:Flatlist/doc}} \n \n [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
{{documentation|Template:Flatlist/doc}} \n \n [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Endflatlist here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{documentation|Template:Flatlist/doc}} \n \n [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
